principles: Every skill must have a 30-second version, a 2-minute version, and a full version.
Partial completion counts. Stopping before harm counts as success.
Use bed/chair-safe options first; standing, lifting, bending, scrubbing, and rushing are optional upgrades, never defaults.
Do not use shame, moral failure, laziness, cleanliness-as-worth, body blame, or 'just push through' language.
Build in caregiver capacity checks: 'Can we do this now, later, smaller, or not today?'
Avoid silent-treatment framing. A pause should mean: 'I am coming back; I am regulating.'

daily.name: Start Day capacity check
tiny_steps: Check breathing, pain, MCAS/sensory load, sleepiness, and caregiver capacity.
daily.success_definition: The day is started when capacity is named, not when a task is finished.

daily.name: One DBT/ADHD skill
daily.success_definition: Reading the tiny version counts on flare days.

daily.name: Reset after conflict/overload
tiny_steps: Say: pause means I am coming back.
Set a return cue/time if possible.
daily.success_definition: No one has to chase reassurance through silence.

weekly.name: Shared skill review
tiny_steps: Pick one that felt too hard.

weekly.name: Caregiver rest block
tiny_steps: Put Jasper's rest on the plan.
Choose what will not be done during that rest.

weekly.name: Tiny environment reset
tiny_steps: Stop at five minutes or before symptoms rise.
weekly.success_definition: A safer tiny zone is enough.

weekly.name: Repair and reassurance check
tiny_steps: Name one boundary for next week.

monthly.name: Skill folder tune-up
tiny_steps: Archive ones that shame or overwhelm.
monthly.success_definition: The shared folder stays alive and usable.

monthly.name: Supplies and access check
tiny_steps: Add one missing support to the list.
monthly.success_definition: Barriers are caught before crisis when possible.

monthly.name: Medical/admin gentle batch
tiny_steps: Pick one form, appointment, refill, or phone call.
monthly.success_definition: Admin is moved without consuming the whole month.

yearly.name: Shared care language review
tiny_steps: Update scripts that no longer fit.
yearly.success_definition: The app respects who you are now.

yearly.name: Privacy and safety review
tiny_steps: Remove sensitive details that do not need to be visible.
Confirm links/pages do not expose private info.

yearly.name: Emergency/access documents review
tiny_steps: Check emergency contacts and medical notes.
yearly.success_definition: A future hard day has less chaos.
